sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong cing, migi Pasian, I khan tawntung hong nai hen,
Lungdam lungnopna siang, Hong ompih sak
Lungman laitak inah, Lam man hong tawnsak ding,
Lei pan vantung dongah, A sia hong

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pa Pasian le Tapa, A hong ompih kha Siangtho,
Tun phatna lungdamna, van sang bel-ah i puak
Lei le van in tawntung, Biakna a pia uh hi.
Tuma, tulai, tunung, Amah bek Pasian hi.
